I Built an AI Agent Operating System (And It Might Be the Best Thing I’ve Made With AI)

This could be the single best thing I have ever built with AI...

Julian Goldie SEO
Jun 09, 2026

It is a full operating system run by teams of AI agents.

They work together, build apps, take notes, and save me hours every single day.

Here is what is inside it, the biggest lesson I learned building it, and how you can start your own today.

Watch the full walkthrough here:

What Is an Agent Operating System?

Most people have AI tools like Claude, Open Claw, or Hermes.

But they have no idea what to actually do with them.

So I built a system that puts everything in one place.

Here is what is inside:

  • An agency group chat where I talk to my AI agents

  • Paperclip, an AI company full of agent teams that build things on free models

  • A to-do list and a second brain to keep me organized

  • A voice agent that builds real apps while I do other work

Everything connects, so it runs like one smooth machine.

Meet Hermes Jarvis, My Voice Agent

This is the first voice agent I have seen that is actually useful.

Most voice tools just chat with you.

Jarvis builds things.

Using only my voice, I have created:

  • A meditation app

  • A galaxy visualization tool

  • A Japanese flashcard game

While Jarvis builds, I go do other work like making thumbnails.

By the time I come back, the app is ready to go.

It can even check my Obsidian memory and tell me what I worked on that day in one short line.

That alone is a game changer.

The Ideas Factory

This is one of my favorite parts.

I plug in an idea, and it moves through four stages on its own.

Stage one, to two, to three, to four.

It turns a rough idea into something I can ship in minutes.

Not days. Not weeks. Not never.

The Memory Galaxy

My agents write notes about my work all day long.

Every app, thumbnail, and chat gets saved to my Obsidian vault automatically.

I do not write any of it myself.

It looks stunning in a demo.

But there is an honest truth about it, and I will share it below.

The Biggest Lesson I Learned

This is a system you build, not a workflow you set and forget.

Your first version will probably be rough.

So will your second.

It might not be great until the 10th, 20th, or even 30th try.

Here is the loop that works:

  • Build it

  • Test it

  • Give Claude feedback

  • Test it again

  • Repeat until it shines

One quick win: I switched my model to Minimax and the quality jumped right away.

It takes time and patience.

But it is honestly a lot of fun.

Shiny vs Practical (Always Pick Practical)

Some things look cool but you will never use them.

Some things look boring but save you hours.

Learn to tell the difference.

For example:

  • The Memory Galaxy looks amazing, but I would not use it every day

  • The thumbnail system looks plain, but my team uses it daily

That thumbnail system replaces a designer who charges $25 per thumbnail.

Now I make them in one click.

They get saved automatically, and the system learns to write better prompts over time.

Focus on the boring, useful stuff first.

How to Start (Without the Overwhelm)

You could automate a million things today.

So do not try to do all of them at once.

Just ask yourself one simple question:

What is the one thing eating up all my time?

Then automate that.

  • Spend your time on SEO content? Build an SEO workflow.

  • Spend it on thumbnails? Build a thumbnail process.

  • Spend it on avatar videos? Set up an avatar automation.

Pick one thing this week.

Then build from there.

Want My Exact System?

I improve and update this system every single day with genuinely useful tools.

You can build your own from scratch.

Or you can grab my full setup, ready to go, inside the AI Profit Boardroom.

Inside you get:

  • The full Agent OS video tutorial and zip file

  • A read me so your agents can install it fast

  • Weekly coaching calls where you share your screen and ask questions

  • A community of members winning with AI automation every day

Come join us and start building.

Get started here: https://www.skool.com/ai-profit-lab-7462/about
